name: ASAP Pest and Wildlife Removal
tagline: One call. Problem solved. Peace restored.
description: Licensed pest control and humane wildlife removal serving Metro Atlanta. Available 24/6 with same-day service. Call (770) 691-3636.

address.full: 2990 Pine Canyon Dr. SW Unit 11, Atlanta, GA 30331

process.title: Inspect
process.description: We thoroughly examine your property to identify the pest, find entry points, and assess the full scope of the problem.

process.title: Trap
process.description: Using humane, effective methods we safely capture and remove wildlife or eliminate pest populations from your property.

process.title: Exclude
process.description: We seal every entry point so animals and pests cannot return. This is the step most competitors skip.

process.title: Disinfect
process.description: We clean and sanitize affected areas, removing droppings, urine, and nesting materials to protect your family's health.

services.title: Wildlife Removal
services.description: Humane removal of raccoons, squirrels, bats, snakes, opossums, and birds from your home or business.

services.title: Pest Control
services.description: Effective treatment for rats, mice, roaches, ants, termites, and other common household pests.

services.title: Exclusion Services
services.description: Permanent sealing of entry points to prevent wildlife and pests from returning to your property.

services.title: Disinfection & Cleanup
services.description: Professional cleaning of droppings, urine, and nesting materials. Full sanitization of affected areas.

services.title: Dead Animal Removal
services.description: Safe removal and proper disposal of deceased animals. Complete odor elimination treatment.

services.title: Commercial Services
services.description: Discreet, professional pest and wildlife management for restaurants, offices, warehouses, and retail.
